item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-033","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant did not simply add another local patch rule. It recognized the two prior failed prompt edits as an anti-spiral trigger, redirected upstream to diagnose the failure source, check conflicts, and prefer deleting/rewording/reordering existing rules before adding anything. Although it presents a possible meta-rule, that rule functions as a brake/stop condition rather than the requested third local rule, so the core pass criteria are met."}
